title: AMD’s 256-core Epyc 9996 ‘Venice’ claims up to a 3.4x jump over Intel Xeon competition, 20% over Nvidia Vera – Zen 6 comes with up to 1024MB of L3, 16-channel memory, and 5GHz+ clock speeds
content_html:
AMD is finally providing some details on its first Zen 6 CPU, which it has been teasing for over a year. The Epyc 9996 is a 256-core / 512-thread chip, packing AMD’s new Zen 6 architecture, and it’s the first to launch in what AMD describes as a “broad portfolio” for Venice. In addition to claiming significant performance advantages over the impending Nvidia Vera and Intel’s Xeon 6, AMD says it will continue to build out the Venice range with bespoke designs over the next year.

“It’s not just a single processor,” said AMD’s Ravi Kuppuswany, corporate VP of compute and enterprise solutions.q “It’s a portfolio.” AMD says it has purpose-built solutions, splitting its offerings depending on the application, not dissimilar to how Intel has split its Xeon ranges over the past few generations (nor how AMD has softly segmented its Epyc offerings). The roadmap starts with the main Venice lineup on the SP7 socket, which is what AMD has been teasing for so long. It scales up to 256 cores and 512 threads, 1.6 TB/s of memory bandwidth with fast MRDIMMs, and 128 PCIe 6 lanes in 1P configuration (160 lanes in 2P).

Image 1 of 4

Note: When scaling up to 256 cores, AMD uses its Zen 6c “dense” design. With a standard Zen 6 design, AMD says Venice scales up to 128 cores and 256 threads, while high-frequency variations top out at 96 cores.

In the first half of next year, AMD plans to launch Venice on its SP8 socket, offering as few as eight cores and up to 128, focused on smaller deployments. These chips support eight-channel memory with two DIMMs per channel, and the same 128 PCIe 6 lanes.

Venice-X is expected in the second half of 2027, on the SP7 socket. We didn’t see Turin-X, but the last, last-gen Genoa-X came with 96 cores and up to 1152 MB of stacked L3 cache. Those specs haven’t changed (short of the Zen 6 microarchitecture), but AMD says it's able to clock Venice-X up to 5.15 GHz.

Finally, Verano should arrive in the second half of next year on the SP8 socket, and it looks like the most direct competitor to Vera (AMD’s Kuppuswamy had some fun with calling it “Vera-No”). It’s optimized to be an AI host node, says AMD, packing up to 72 cores and 5 GHz peak clocks. Critically, it comes with a 24-channel LPDDR5X memory system, leveraging SOCAMM2 modules.

One of the advantages Nvidia claims with its Vera chip is lots of memory bandwidth through the LPDDR5X system. AMD’s approach is different with Venice SP7. It’s scaling up to 16-channel memory with Venice SP7, with support for MRDIMMs running at 12,800 MT/s, or standard DDR5 RDIMMs running at 8000 MT/s.

Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.

It’s a significant jump over Turin, which uses 12-channel memory, with support for RDIMMs running at 6400 MT/s. AMD claims per-socket bandwidth of 1.6 TB/s, significantly higher than the 1.2 TB/s available on Vera, and nearly triple the 576 GB/s per-socket bandwidth of Turin. Intel recently enabled 8000 MT/s RDIMMs on select Granite Rapids and Clearwater Forest SKUs, and it says support for MRDIMMs with speeds up to 8800 MT/s is coming in Q1 2027.

Zen 6 is built on TSMC’s N2 (this has been previously confirmed). AMD confirmed that there are 32 cores on a CCD, along with two IODs. Keep in mind that the 32-core CCD is using Zen 6c, not full Zen 6. There has been plenty of speculation about 32-core CCDs in consumer Zen 6 CPUs, but that seems unlikely.

The 256-core configuration comes with a massive 1,024 MB of L3, nearly triple the amount of the Epyc 9965. This isn’t stacked cache, either; that will come with Venice-X. Each CCD has access to 128 MB or L3, or 4 MB per core, double what was available on Turin.

Although AMD has focused a lot of its teases on the 256-core Venice, the initial SP7 offerings will also hold a 96-core, high-frequency model that can clock up to 5 GHz.

Image 1 of 6

Unlike the extrapolated performance AMD shared a few weeks back, we have some concrete benchmarks for the Epyc 9996 now. AMD has, unsurprisingly, focused the workloads around agentic AI. However, many of the workloads applicable for agentic AI are applicable elsewhere, as well, including high-concurrency networking tasks, code compilation, and media processing.

Note that AMD includes just the Epyc 9965 as a gen-on-gen comparison point in the charts above. This is a “dense” Zen 5 design with 192 cores. Results for the 128-core 9755 are included in the tables below.

Starting with front-end operations, AMD claims a 1.2x gen-on-gen improvement and a 2.8x improvement compared to Intel Xeon 6980P, with an NGINX web server using the WRK load generator. Unlike most of these competitive performance figures, AMD included the actual numbers for the benchmarks it ran in the footnotes, which you can see in the table below.

In data-heavy workloads that are common among AI agents, AMD claims a 1.7x improvement over Turn, and a massive 3.4x over the Xeon 6980P. AMD used the TPCx-AI benchmark to gather these results. The primary metric for this test is AI use cases per minute (AIUCpm), for which AMD shared the median result2. If you’re interested in more about the reporting of this benchmark, Dell has published an extensive breakdown.

In vectorized workloads, AMD claims a 1.6x gen-on-gen improvement and 2.3x improvement compared to the Xeon 6980P. For this test, AMD used Meta’s open-source FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) library to search for similar vectors in the siftm1 dataset. The metric here is QPS, or queries processed per second, looking at overall query throughput.

For its “enterprise tools” benchmarks, AMD ran several tests, including TPC-H, TPC-C, and Redis, and it reports the results as “geomean throughput.” We have actual numbers here, but they’re a geomean representing several different tests rather than a single benchmark. Broadly, however, AMD claims a 1.6x gen-on-gen improvement in these workloads, and a 2.6x improvement compared to Intel.

A lot of agentic workloads are applicable outside of agents, but AMD also tested a few agents directly. It replayed five different agent personas across the chips and, once again, gathered a throughput geomean. We don’t have the metrics here, nor for the previous benchmark, so it’s possible there’s an angle of performance that we’re not seeing with the data provided by AMD.

Regardless, the company claims a 1.5x gen-on-gen improvement in this test, and a 2.5x improvement compared to the 6980P.

AMD ran these tests earlier in the month. But just a few days ago, Nvidia published its first SPEC CPU 2026 results for Vera. AMD ran some tests of its own using the same compiler for a comparison between Vera and Venice. AMD’s Kuppuswamy says, “everything is apples-to-apples comparison, same compiler.” That’s GNU 15.2, if you’re curious.

In throughput, AMD claims a 2.2x improvement in the SPECrate integer suite, compared to Vera using the dense Venice design with 256 Zen 6c cores. More importantly, AMD claims a 1.2x improvement in per-core performance when comparing Vera to a 96-core “High Frequency” Venice chip. AMD says it used Nvidia’s results as the basis for comparison. With both Venice designs, AMD used a 600W TDP.

In SPEC CPU 2017 (again using SPECrate with integer workloads), AMD has data comparing Venice to Intel’s 6980P and Arm’s new AGI, showing 2x throughput compared to Intel, and 1.3x per-core performance. Note the core counts here for AMD. SPECrate is a throughput test, and AMD stepping down to a 128-core model suggests that performance will likely drop off as the core count increases.

Image 1 of 2

Although AMD wants to focus Venice performance on agentic workloads, it shared a range of what are now being called “legacy” workloads across the cloud and HPC. Some of the results are repeated from the earlier slides, such as Redis and NGINX, but there are some additional data points, including NAMD and SQL. The performance improvements here are large, though not surprising. You can see that across these tests, even Turin beats the competition from Intel and AWS.

Jake Roach is the Senior CPU Analyst at Tom’s Hardware, writing reviews, news, and features about the latest consumer and workstation processors.

blocks.html_en: In the first half of next year, AMD plans to launch Venice on its SP8 socket, offering as few as eight cores and up to 128, focused on smaller deployments. These chips support eight-channel memory with two DIMMs per channel, and the same 128 PCIe 6 lanes.

sentences.en: In the first half of next year, AMD plans to launch Venice on its SP8 socket, offering as few as eight cores and up to 128, focused on smaller deployments.
sentences.zh: 明年上半年，AMD 计划在 SP8 插槽上推出 Venice，提供少至 8 个核心，多至 128 个核心，专注于小型部署。

sentences.en: These chips support eight-channel memory with two DIMMs per channel, and the same 128 PCIe 6 lanes.
sentences.zh: 这些芯片支持八通道内存，每个通道有两个 DIMM，以及相同的 128 个 PCIe 6 通道。

blocks.html_en: Venice-X is expected in the second half of 2027, on the SP7 socket. We didn’t see Turin-X, but the last, last-gen Genoa-X came with 96 cores and up to 1152 MB of stacked L3 cache. Those specs haven’t changed (short of the Zen 6 microarchitecture), but AMD says it's able to clock Venice-X up to 5.15 GHz.

sentences.en: Venice-X is expected in the second half of 2027, on the SP7 socket.
sentences.zh: Venice-X 预计将于 2027 年下半年推出，采用 SP7 插槽。

sentences.en: We didn’t see Turin-X, but the last, last-gen Genoa-X came with 96 cores and up to 1152 MB of stacked L3 cache.
sentences.zh: 我们没有看到 Turin-X，但最后一代 Genoa-X 配备 96 个核心和高达 1152 MB 的堆叠 L3 缓存。

sentences.en: Those specs haven’t changed (short of the Zen 6 microarchitecture), but AMD says it's able to clock Venice-X up to 5.15 GHz.
sentences.zh: 这些规格没有改变（除了 Zen 6 微架构），但 AMD 表示它能够将 Venice-X 的时钟频率提高到 5.15 GHz。

blocks.html_en: Finally, Verano should arrive in the second half of next year on the SP8 socket, and it looks like the most direct competitor to Vera (AMD’s Kuppuswamy had some fun with calling it “Vera-No”). It’s optimized to be an AI host node, says AMD, packing up to 72 cores and 5 GHz peak clocks. Critically, it comes with a 24-channel LPDDR5X memory system, leveraging SOCAMM2 modules.

sentences.en: Finally, Verano should arrive in the second half of next year on the SP8 socket, and it looks like the most direct competitor to Vera (AMD’s Kuppuswamy had some fun with calling it “Vera-No”).
sentences.zh: 最后，Verano 应该会在明年下半年推出 SP8 插槽，它看起来像是 Vera 最直接的竞争对手（AMD 的 Kuppuswamy 开玩笑地称其为“Vera-No”）。

sentences.en: It’s optimized to be an AI host node, says AMD, packing up to 72 cores and 5 GHz peak clocks.
sentences.zh: AMD 表示，它经过优化，可成为 AI 主机节点，最多可容纳 72 个核心和 5 GHz 峰值时钟。

sentences.en: Critically, it comes with a 24-channel LPDDR5X memory system, leveraging SOCAMM2 modules.
sentences.zh: 重要的是，它配备了 24 通道 LPDDR5X 内存系统，利用 SOCAMM2 模块。

blocks.html_en: One of the advantages Nvidia claims with its Vera chip is lots of memory bandwidth through the LPDDR5X system. AMD’s approach is different with Venice SP7. It’s scaling up to 16-channel memory with Venice SP7, with support for MRDIMMs running at 12,800 MT/s, or standard DDR5 RDIMMs running at 8000 MT/s.

sentences.en: One of the advantages Nvidia claims with its Vera chip is lots of memory bandwidth through the LPDDR5X system.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 声称其 Vera 芯片的优势之一是通过 LPDDR5X 系统提供大量内存带宽。

sentences.en: AMD’s approach is different with Venice SP7.
sentences.zh: AMD 的做法与 Venice SP7 不同。

sentences.en: It’s scaling up to 16-channel memory with Venice SP7, with support for MRDIMMs running at 12,800 MT/s, or standard DDR5 RDIMMs running at 8000 MT/s.
sentences.zh: 它通过 Venice SP7 扩展到 16 通道内存，支持以 12,800 MT/s 运行的 MRDIMM，或以 8000 MT/s 运行的标准 DDR5 RDIMM。

blocks.html_en: Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.

sentences.en: Get Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.
sentences.zh: 将 Tom's Hardware 的最佳新闻和深入评论直接发送到您的收件箱。

blocks.html_en: It’s a significant jump over Turin, which uses 12-channel memory, with support for RDIMMs running at 6400 MT/s. AMD claims per-socket bandwidth of 1.6 TB/s, significantly higher than the 1.2 TB/s available on Vera, and nearly triple the 576 GB/s per-socket bandwidth of Turin. Intel recently enabled 8000 MT/s RDIMMs on select Granite Rapids and Clearwater Forest SKUs, and it says support for MRDIMMs with speeds up to 8800 MT/s is coming in Q1 2027.

sentences.en: It’s a significant jump over Turin, which uses 12-channel memory, with support for RDIMMs running at 6400 MT/s.
sentences.zh: 与使用 12 通道内存并支持以 6400 MT/s 速度运行的 RDIMM 的 Turin 相比，这是一个显着的进步。

sentences.en: AMD claims per-socket bandwidth of 1.6 TB/s, significantly higher than the 1.2 TB/s available on Vera, and nearly triple the 576 GB/s per-socket bandwidth of Turin.
sentences.zh: AMD 声称每插槽带宽为 1.6 TB/s，明显高于 Vera 上的 1.2 TB/s，几乎是 Turin 576 GB/s 的每插槽带宽的三倍。

sentences.en: Intel recently enabled 8000 MT/s RDIMMs on select Granite Rapids and Clearwater Forest SKUs, and it says support for MRDIMMs with speeds up to 8800 MT/s is coming in Q1 2027.
sentences.zh: 英特尔最近在部分 Granite Rapids 和 Clearwater Forest SKU 上启用了 8000 MT/s RDIMM，并表示将于 2027 年第一季度支持速度高达 8800 MT/s 的 MRDIMM。

blocks.html_en: Zen 6 is built on TSMC’s N2 (this has been previously confirmed). AMD confirmed that there are 32 cores on a CCD, along with two IODs. Keep in mind that the 32-core CCD is using Zen 6c, not full Zen 6. There has been plenty of speculation about 32-core CCDs in consumer Zen 6 CPUs, but that seems unlikely.

sentences.en: Zen 6 is built on TSMC’s N2 (this has been previously confirmed).
sentences.zh: Zen 6是基于台积电的N2构建的（这一点之前已经得到证实）。

sentences.en: AMD confirmed that there are 32 cores on a CCD, along with two IODs.
sentences.zh: AMD 确认 CCD 上有 32 个核心，以及两个 IOD。

sentences.en: Keep in mind that the 32-core CCD is using Zen 6c, not full Zen 6.
sentences.zh: 请记住，32 核 CCD 使用的是 Zen 6c，而不是完整的 Zen 6。

sentences.en: There has been plenty of speculation about 32-core CCDs in consumer Zen 6 CPUs, but that seems unlikely.
sentences.zh: 关于消费级 Zen 6 CPU 中是否配备 32 核 CCD 有很多猜测，但这似乎不太可能。

blocks.html_en: The 256-core configuration comes with a massive 1,024 MB of L3, nearly triple the amount of the Epyc 9965. This isn’t stacked cache, either; that will come with Venice-X. Each CCD has access to 128 MB or L3, or 4 MB per core, double what was available on Turin.

sentences.en: The 256-core configuration comes with a massive 1,024 MB of L3, nearly triple the amount of the Epyc 9965.
sentences.zh: 256 核配置配备了巨大的 1,024 MB L3，几乎是 Epyc 9965 容量的三倍。

sentences.en: This isn’t stacked cache, either; that will come with Venice-X.
sentences.zh: 这也不是堆叠式缓存；这将随 Venice-X 一起提供。

sentences.en: Each CCD has access to 128 MB or L3, or 4 MB per core, double what was available on Turin.
sentences.zh: 每个 CCD 均可访问 128 MB 或 L3，即每个核心 4 MB，是 Turin 上可用容量的两倍。

blocks.html_en: Although AMD has focused a lot of its teases on the 256-core Venice, the initial SP7 offerings will also hold a 96-core, high-frequency model that can clock up to 5 GHz.

sentences.en: Although AMD has focused a lot of its teases on the 256-core Venice, the initial SP7 offerings will also hold a 96-core, high-frequency model that can clock up to 5 GHz.
sentences.zh: 尽管 AMD 将很多精力都集中在 256 核 Venice 上，但最初的 SP7 产品也将拥有 96 核、时钟频率高达 5 GHz 的高频型号。

blocks.html_en: Unlike the extrapolated performance AMD shared a few weeks back, we have some concrete benchmarks for the Epyc 9996 now. AMD has, unsurprisingly, focused the workloads around agentic AI. However, many of the workloads applicable for agentic AI are applicable elsewhere, as well, including high-concurrency networking tasks, code compilation, and media processing.

sentences.en: Unlike the extrapolated performance AMD shared a few weeks back, we have some concrete benchmarks for the Epyc 9996 now.
sentences.zh: 与 AMD 几周前分享的推断性能不同，我们现在有一些针对 Epyc 9996 的具体基准测试。

sentences.en: AMD has, unsurprisingly, focused the workloads around agentic AI.
sentences.zh: 毫不奇怪，AMD 将工作负载集中在代理 AI 周围。

sentences.en: However, many of the workloads applicable for agentic AI are applicable elsewhere, as well, including high-concurrency networking tasks, code compilation, and media processing.
sentences.zh: 然而，许多适用于代理人工智能的工作负载也适用于其他地方，包括高并发网络任务、代码编译和媒体处理。

sentences.zh: 不过，总体而言，AMD 声称这些工作负载比上一代提高了 1.6 倍，与英特尔相比提高了 2.6 倍。

blocks.html_en: AMD ran these tests earlier in the month. But just a few days ago, Nvidia published its first SPEC CPU 2026 results for Vera. AMD ran some tests of its own using the same compiler for a comparison between Vera and Venice. AMD’s Kuppuswamy says, “everything is apples-to-apples comparison, same compiler.” That’s GNU 15.2, if you’re curious.

sentences.en: AMD ran these tests earlier in the month.
sentences.zh: AMD 在本月早些时候进行了这些测试。

sentences.en: But just a few days ago, Nvidia published its first SPEC CPU 2026 results for Vera.
sentences.zh: 但就在几天前，Nvidia 发布了 Vera 的第一个 SPEC CPU 2026 结果。

sentences.en: AMD ran some tests of its own using the same compiler for a comparison between Vera and Venice.
sentences.zh: AMD 使用相同的编译器运行了一些自己的测试，以对 Vera 和 Venice 进行比较。

sentences.en: AMD’s Kuppuswamy says, “everything is apples-to-apples comparison, same compiler.”
sentences.zh: AMD 的库普斯瓦米 (Kuppuswamy) 表示：“一切都是同类比较，相同的编译器。”
如果你好奇的话，那就是 GNU 15.2。
（图片来源：AMD）

blocks.html_en: In throughput, AMD claims a 2.2x improvement in the SPECrate integer suite, compared to Vera using the dense Venice design with 256 Zen 6c cores. More importantly, AMD claims a 1.2x improvement in per-core performance when comparing Vera to a 96-core “High Frequency” Venice chip. AMD says it used Nvidia’s results as the basis for comparison. With both Venice designs, AMD used a 600W TDP.

sentences.en: In throughput, AMD claims a 2.2x improvement in the SPECrate integer suite, compared to Vera using the dense Venice design with 256 Zen 6c cores.
sentences.zh: 在吞吐量方面，AMD 声称 SPECrate 整数套件比使用具有 256 个 Zen 6c 核心的密集 Venice 设计的 Vera 提高了 2.2 倍。

sentences.en: More importantly, AMD claims a 1.2x improvement in per-core performance when comparing Vera to a 96-core “High Frequency” Venice chip.
sentences.zh: 更重要的是，AMD 声称，将 Vera 与 96 核“高频”Venice 芯片进行比较时，每核性能提高了 1.2 倍。

sentences.en: AMD says it used Nvidia’s results as the basis for comparison.
sentences.zh: AMD 表示，它使用 Nvidia 的结果作为比较的基础。

sentences.en: With both Venice designs, AMD used a 600W TDP.
sentences.zh: AMD 在这两种 Venice 设计中都使用了 600W TDP。
（图片来源：AMD）

blocks.html_en: In SPEC CPU 2017 (again using SPECrate with integer workloads), AMD has data comparing Venice to Intel’s 6980P and Arm’s new AGI, showing 2x throughput compared to Intel, and 1.3x per-core performance. Note the core counts here for AMD. SPECrate is a throughput test, and AMD stepping down to a 128-core model suggests that performance will likely drop off as the core count increases.

sentences.en: In SPEC CPU 2017 (again using SPECrate with integer workloads), AMD has data comparing Venice to Intel’s 6980P and Arm’s new AGI, showing 2x throughput compared to Intel, and 1.3x per-core performance.
sentences.zh: 在 SPEC CPU 2017（再次使用具有整数工作负载的 SPECrate）中，AMD 提供了将 Venice 与英特尔 6980P 和 Arm 的新 AGI 进行比较的数据，显示吞吐量是英特尔的 2 倍，每核性能是 1.3 倍。

sentences.en: Note the core counts here for AMD.
sentences.zh: 请注意此处 AMD 的核心数。

sentences.en: SPECrate is a throughput test, and AMD stepping down to a 128-core model suggests that performance will likely drop off as the core count increases.
sentences.zh: SPECrate 是一项吞吐量测试，AMD 逐步转向 128 核型号表明，随着核心数量的增加，性能可能会下降。

blocks.html_en: Although AMD wants to focus Venice performance on agentic workloads, it shared a range of what are now being called “legacy” workloads across the cloud and HPC. Some of the results are repeated from the earlier slides, such as Redis and NGINX, but there are some additional data points, including NAMD and SQL. The performance improvements here are large, though not surprising. You can see that across these tests, even Turin beats the competition from Intel and AWS.

sentences.en: Although AMD wants to focus Venice performance on agentic workloads, it shared a range of what are now being called “legacy” workloads across the cloud and HPC.
sentences.zh: 尽管 AMD 希望将 Venice 性能重点放在代理工作负载上，但它在云和 HPC 中共享了一系列现在被称为“传统”工作负载的内容。

sentences.en: Some of the results are repeated from the earlier slides, such as Redis and NGINX, but there are some additional data points, including NAMD and SQL.
sentences.zh: 一些结果重复了之前的幻灯片，例如 Redis 和 NGINX，但还有一些额外的数据点，包括 NAMD 和 SQL。

sentences.en: The performance improvements here are large, though not surprising.
sentences.zh: 这里的性能改进很大，但并不令人惊讶。

sentences.en: You can see that across these tests, even Turin beats the competition from Intel and AWS.

content_html_zh:
AMD 终于提供了有关其首款 Zen 6 CPU 的一些细节，该公司已经对其进行了一年多的调侃。 Epyc 9996 是一款 256 核/512 线程芯片，封装了 AMD 的全新 Zen 6 架构，也是 AMD 所称的 Venice“广泛产品组合”中首款推出的芯片。 除了声称相对于即将推出的 Nvidia Vera 和英特尔 Xeon 6 具有显着的性能优势外，AMD 表示将在明年继续通过定制设计打造 Venice 系列。

AMD 计算和企业解决方案公司副总裁 Ravi Kuppuswany 表示：“这不仅仅是一个处理器，而是一个产品组合。” AMD 表示，它有专门构建的解决方案，根据应用程序划分其产品，这与英特尔在过去几代中划分其 Xeon 系列的方式没有什么不同（也没有 AMD 对其 Epyc 产品进行软细分的方式）。 该路线图从 SP7 插槽上的主要 Venice 系列开始，这也是 AMD 长期以来一直在戏弄的产品。 它可扩展至 256 个核心和 512 个线程、1.6 TB/s 的内存带宽（具有快速 MRDIMM）以及 1P 配置中的 128 个 PCIe 6 通道（2P 配置中的 160 个通道）。

第 1 张图片（共 4 张）

注意：当扩展到 256 个核心时，AMD 使用其 Zen 6c“密集”设计。 AMD 表示，Venice 采用标准 Zen 6 设计，可扩展至 128 个核心和 256 个线程，而高频版本最高可达 96 个核心。

明年上半年，AMD 计划在 SP8 插槽上推出 Venice，提供少至 8 个核心，多至 128 个核心，专注于小型部署。 这些芯片支持八通道内存，每个通道有两个 DIMM，以及相同的 128 个 PCIe 6 通道。

Venice-X 预计将于 2027 年下半年推出，采用 SP7 插槽。 我们没有看到 Turin-X，但最后一代 Genoa-X 配备 96 个核心和高达 1152 MB 的堆叠 L3 缓存。 这些规格没有改变（除了 Zen 6 微架构），但 AMD 表示它能够将 Venice-X 的时钟频率提高到 5.15 GHz。

最后，Verano 应该会在明年下半年推出 SP8 插槽，它看起来像是 Vera 最直接的竞争对手（AMD 的 Kuppuswamy 开玩笑地称其为“Vera-No”）。 AMD 表示，它经过优化，可成为 AI 主机节点，最多可容纳 72 个核心和 5 GHz 峰值时钟。 重要的是，它配备了 24 通道 LPDDR5X 内存系统，利用 SOCAMM2 模块。

Nvidia 声称其 Vera 芯片的优势之一是通过 LPDDR5X 系统提供大量内存带宽。 AMD 的做法与 Venice SP7 不同。 它通过 Venice SP7 扩展到 16 通道内存，支持以 12,800 MT/s 运行的 MRDIMM，或以 8000 MT/s 运行的标准 DDR5 RDIMM。

与使用 12 通道内存并支持以 6400 MT/s 速度运行的 RDIMM 的 Turin 相比，这是一个显着的进步。 AMD 声称每插槽带宽为 1.6 TB/s，明显高于 Vera 上的 1.2 TB/s，几乎是 Turin 576 GB/s 的每插槽带宽的三倍。 英特尔最近在部分 Granite Rapids 和 Clearwater Forest SKU 上启用了 8000 MT/s RDIMM，并表示将于 2027 年第一季度支持速度高达 8800 MT/s 的 MRDIMM。

Zen 6是基于台积电的N2构建的（这一点之前已经得到证实）。 AMD 确认 CCD 上有 32 个核心，以及两个 IOD。 请记住，32 核 CCD 使用的是 Zen 6c，而不是完整的 Zen 6。 关于消费级 Zen 6 CPU 中是否配备 32 核 CCD 有很多猜测，但这似乎不太可能。

256 核配置配备了巨大的 1,024 MB L3，几乎是 Epyc 9965 容量的三倍。 这也不是堆叠式缓存；这将随 Venice-X 一起提供。 每个 CCD 均可访问 128 MB 或 L3，即每个核心 4 MB，是 Turin 上可用容量的两倍。

尽管 AMD 将很多精力都集中在 256 核 Venice 上，但最初的 SP7 产品也将拥有 96 核、时钟频率高达 5 GHz 的高频型号。

第 1 张图片（共 6 张）

与 AMD 几周前分享的推断性能不同，我们现在有一些针对 Epyc 9996 的具体基准测试。 毫不奇怪，AMD 将工作负载集中在代理 AI 周围。 然而，许多适用于代理人工智能的工作负载也适用于其他地方，包括高并发网络任务、代码编译和媒体处理。

请注意，AMD 在上表中仅将 Epyc 9965 作为逐代​​比较点。 这是具有 192 个核心的“密集”Zen 5 设计。 下表包含 128 核 9755 的结果。

从前端操作开始，AMD 声称与 Intel Xeon 6980P 相比，性能提升了 1.2 倍，并且与使用 WRK 负载生成器的 NGINX Web 服务器相比，性能提升了 2.8 倍。 与大多数竞争性能数据不同，AMD 在脚注中包含了其运行的基准测试的实际数据，您可以在下表中看到。

对于“企业工具”基准测试，AMD 运行了多项测试，包括 TPC-H、TPC-C 和 Redis，并将结果报告为“几何吞吐量”。 我们这里有实际的数字，但它们是代表多个不同测试的几何平均值，而不是单个基准。 不过，总体而言，AMD 声称这些工作负载比上一代提高了 1.6 倍，与英特尔相比提高了 2.6 倍。

许多代理工作负载适用于代理之外，但 AMD 也直接测试了一些代理。 它在芯片上重放了五个不同的代理角色，并再次收集了吞吐量几何平均值。 我们这里没有指标，也没有之前的基准测试，因此可能存在我们在 AMD 提供的数据中没有看到的性能角度。

不管怎样，该公司声称在这次测试中比上代提升了 1.5 倍，与 6980P 相比提升了 2.5 倍。

AMD 在本月早些时候进行了这些测试。 但就在几天前，Nvidia 发布了 Vera 的第一个 SPEC CPU 2026 结果。 AMD 使用相同的编译器运行了一些自己的测试，以对 Vera 和 Venice 进行比较。 AMD 的库普斯瓦米 (Kuppuswamy) 表示：“一切都是同类比较，相同的编译器。” 如果你好奇的话，那就是 GNU 15.2。

在吞吐量方面，AMD 声称 SPECrate 整数套件比使用具有 256 个 Zen 6c 核心的密集 Venice 设计的 Vera 提高了 2.2 倍。 更重要的是，AMD 声称，将 Vera 与 96 核“高频”Venice 芯片进行比较时，每核性能提高了 1.2 倍。 AMD 表示，它使用 Nvidia 的结果作为比较的基础。 AMD 在这两种 Venice 设计中都使用了 600W TDP。

在 SPEC CPU 2017（再次使用具有整数工作负载的 SPECrate）中，AMD 提供了将 Venice 与英特尔 6980P 和 Arm 的新 AGI 进行比较的数据，显示吞吐量是英特尔的 2 倍，每核性能是 1.3 倍。 请注意此处 AMD 的核心数。 SPECrate 是一项吞吐量测试，AMD 逐步转向 128 核型号表明，随着核心数量的增加，性能可能会下降。

第 1 张图片（共 2 张）

尽管 AMD 希望将 Venice 性能重点放在代理工作负载上，但它在云和 HPC 中共享了一系列现在被称为“传统”工作负载的内容。 一些结果重复了之前的幻灯片，例如 Redis 和 NGINX，但还有一些额外的数据点，包括 NAMD 和 SQL。 这里的性能改进很大，但并不令人惊讶。 您可以看到，在这些测试中，甚至都灵也击败了英特尔和 AWS 的竞争对手。
